info.name: ALdeci-7-Scanners-OSS-AutoFix
info.description:
ALdeci CTEM+ Native Scanner, OSS/SCA, and AutoFix Engine API tests.

Covers all 8 built-in scanners, OSS tools (Trivy/Grype/Sigstore/OPA), AutoFix engine (10 fix types), SBOM/Validation, and Brain Pipeline CTEM lifecycle.

These endpoints work AIR-GAPPED — no external tool dependencies required.

exec: // ALdeci CTEM+ Scanner Collection — Global Pre-request

item.name: 1. SAST Scanner
item.description: Static Application Security Testing — native ALdeci scanner (sast_engine.py, 465 LOC)

item.name: 2. DAST Scanner
item.description: Dynamic Application Security Testing — native ALdeci scanner (dast_engine.py, 533 LOC)

item.name: 3. Secrets Scanner
item.description: Secrets Detection — native ALdeci scanner (secrets_scanner.py, 775 LOC). 200+ patterns, entropy analysis.

item.name: 4. Container Scanner
item.description: Container Security — native ALdeci scanner (container_scanner.py, 410 LOC). Dockerfile analysis, image scanning, CVE matching.

body.raw:
{
  "dockerfile_content": "FROM python:3.11
RUN pip install flask
USER root
EXPOSE 22
CMD ["python", "app.py"]",
  "check_cis_benchmark": true,
  "content": "FROM python:3.11
RUN pip install flask
USER root
EXPOSE 80",
  "filename": "Dockerfile"
}

item.name: 5. CSPM & IaC Scanner
item.description: Cloud Security Posture Management & Infrastructure-as-Code scanning (cspm_analyzer.py, 586 LOC + iac_router.py, 243 LOC)

item.name: 6. API Fuzzer
item.description: API endpoint discovery and fuzzing — native ALdeci scanner (api_fuzzer_router.py, 56 LOC)

item.name: 7. Malware Detector
item.description: Malware analysis — native ALdeci scanner (malware_router.py, 59 LOC). Content analysis, signature matching, heuristic detection.

item.name: 8. LLM Monitor
item.description: LLM Security Monitor — prompt injection detection, jailbreak detection, PII leakage prevention (llm_monitor_router.py)

exec: // Response may use various keys for analysis results

item.name: 9. OSS/SCA Tools
item.description: Open Source Security / Software Composition Analysis — Trivy, Grype, Sigstore, OPA integration (oss_tools.py, 206 LOC)

item.name: 10. AutoFix Engine
item.description: AI-Powered AutoFix — 10 fix types, confidence-based auto-apply, PR generation (autofix_engine.py, 1,260 LOC + autofix_router.py, 270 LOC)

item.name: 11. SBOM & Validation
item.description: Software Bill of Materials generation + input format validation (inventory_router.py + validation_router.py, 492 LOC)

item.name: 12. Brain Pipeline (CTEM Lifecycle)
item.description: 12-Step CTEM Brain Pipeline — the architectural backbone of ALdeci (brain_pipeline.py, 864 LOC). Tests the full Discover→Validate→Remediate→Comply lifecycle.

exec: // Brain stats may have different shape — just verify it returns data

item.name: 13. Air-Gapped Mode Verification
item.description: End-to-end test: Run all 8 native scanners + AutoFix + Brain Pipeline with ZERO external dependencies. Proves ALdeci works fully air-gapped.
